## Checklist
Before merging, confirm all of the following:

- [ ] ✅ All tests passing (`npm run test` + `npm run test:ui`)
- [ ] 🔑 No hardcoded secrets (API keys, passwords, tokens)
- [ ] 📱 Mobile tested (320px, 375px, 428px)
- [ ] 🌙 Dark mode tested
- [ ] 🔄 Arabic RTL tested
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility verified (keyboard navigation, screen reader)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation updated (if API or config changed)
- [ ] 🐳 Whale escrow flow not broken
